gold_sql:
SELECT MaSV, HoTen, TrangThaiSV, MaKhoaHoc, TenKhoaHoc, MaCTDT, MaNganh, TenNganh
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
user_question: tôi đăng nhập với mã sinh viên 23110249

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

SELECT MaSV, HoTen, MaMH, TenMH, SoTC, NamHoc, HocKy, KetQua
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
        ORDER BY NamHoc, HocKy, TenMH
user_question: cho xem transcript các môn đã đạt

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv

        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH

        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,

            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,

        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,

    FROM sv

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110284 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT

user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110288 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky

user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110292 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

gold_sql:
SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110296 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110300 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

gold_sql:
SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110304 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

gold_sql:
SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110309 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

gold_sql:
SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110313 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

gold_sql:
SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110317 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

gold_sql:
SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110321 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

gold_sql:
SELECT ctdt.MaMH, ctdt.TenMH, ctdt.SoTC, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.HKGoiY, sv.MaSV
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv
        JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
        WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND ctdt.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
        ORDER BY ctdt.HKGoiY, ctdt.LoaiYC, ctdt.TenMH
user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110325 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit

        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du sv

user_question: nếu xét theo CTĐT của sinh viên 23110329 thì kỳ này nên xem môn nào

gold_sql:
WITH sv AS (
        SELECT MaSV, MaCTDT
        FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
    ),
    passed AS (
        SELECT MaMH
        FROM v_ket_qua_day_du
        WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
          AND KetQua = 'DAT'
    ),
    open_lhp AS (
        SELECT
            MaMH,
            MIN(MaLHP) AS MaLHPGoiY,
            MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
        FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du
        WHERE NamHoc = :nam_hoc
          AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
          AND TrangThaiLHP = 'MO'
          AND SoChoCon > 0
        GROUP BY MaMH
    )
    SELECT
        'GOI_Y' AS TrangThaiGoiY,
        CASE
            WHEN ctdt.LoaiYC = 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 'HIGH'
            WHEN ctdt.HKGoiY <= :hoc_ky THEN 'MEDIUM'
            ELSE 'LOW'
        END AS MucUuTien,
        sv.MaSV,
        ctdt.MaMH,
        ctdt.TenMH,
        ctdt.SoTC,
        ctdt.LoaiYC,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.MaLHPGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon,
        :nam_hoc AS NamHoc,
        :hoc_ky AS HocKy
    FROM sv
    JOIN v_mon_hoc_ctdt ctdt ON ctdt.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
    JOIN open_lhp ON open_lhp.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    LEFT JOIN passed ON passed.MaMH = ctdt.MaMH
    WHERE passed.MaMH IS NULL
      AND (:loai_yc IS NULL OR ctdt.LoaiYC = :loai_yc)
    ORDER BY
        CASE ctdt.LoaiYC WHEN 'BAT_BUOC' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        ctdt.HKGoiY,
        open_lhp.SoChoCon DESC,
        ctdt.TenMH
    LIMIT :limit
